deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'export NODE_OPTIONS="--max-http-header-size=65536"; echo "[start $(date -u +%FT%TZ)] container up, running prisma migrate deploy"; timeout 45 npx prisma migrate deploy || echo "[start $(date -u +%FT%TZ)] migrate deploy timed out or failed (exit $?) — continuing so Next can still serve"; echo "[start $(date -u +%FT%TZ)] launching next server (NODE_OPTIONS=$NODE_OPTIONS)"; exec npm run start'
